subject: Phase 5: cross-reference sweep across .py/.md/.ipynb for old-style paths
description: Grep repo-wide for old-style path strings: thesis/data, thesis/modelling, thesis-writing, thesis-context, thesis/literature, utility_scripts/scripts/srq*, utility_scripts/scripts/forecast_service.py, _03_engineered_dvhexclhd, _04_engineered_bychain, _05_results, _06_results, _07_forecast. Update references to point at new tier locations. Specifically check CLAUDE.md, user-docs/contributing/repository_map.md, any notebooks under 03_thesis_modelling/notebooks/ (check .ipynb JSON string literals, not just .py imports), and docs/handover/2026-07-01_enrico-to-brian-merge-handover.md (decide: rewrite historically, or leave as dated snapshot with a pointer to this plan). Verify via: python3 -c imports of new PATHS.py constants, and spot-check 3-4 moved scripts py_compile cleanly from new location.
notes: Repo-wide grep across .py/.md/.ipynb for all listed old-style path patterns. FIXED (live code bugs, 4 files, all had OUTPUT_DIR pointing at deleted thesis/thesis-writing/figures/): utility_scripts/scripts/generate_figures.py, 04_thesis_results/generate_figures.py (byte-identical dupe), utility_scripts/scripts/generate_systemB_diagram.py, 03_thesis_modelling/model_serving/system_b_conversational/generate_systemB_diagram.py (byte-identical dupe) -- all now point at 05_thesis_writing/figures/ (confirmed exists). LEFT ALONE as cosmetic-only (docstrings/comments/print-messages, not live path construction, no functional risk): PATHS.py docstrings (lines ~348,363,657,678 -- live logic already resolves via THESIS_DATA_* constants, confirmed correct), 02_thesis_data/_02_preprocessing/** and preprocessing/nielsen_dvh/** docstrings/comments, pre_csd_1.5_eda.ipynb (stale paths only in FROZEN OUTPUT CELLS from a past run -- rewriting would misrepresent execution history, left untouched). FLAGGED for task 15/17, not touched here: user-docs/contributing/repository_map.md vs user-docs/dev/repository_map.md have DIVERGED (not simple duplicates) and are both stale on the thesis/ restructure -- reconciling canonical version belongs in task 15. AGENTS.md (root) is stale on far more than thesis/ paths (still points at nonexistent docs/ and .Codex/ folders predating the docs->user-docs rename) -- out of scope for a path-string sweep, flagged for the broader docs pass (task 17/18). Handover doc user-docs/handover/2026-07-01_enrico-to-brian-merge-handover.md: decision made per its own dated-snapshot nature -- added a pointer note at top (2026-07-11) referencing this plan's old->new path mapping rather than rewriting the historical content. Verification: python3 -c import PATHS confirms THESIS_DATA_DIR/THESIS_DATA_PREPROCESSING_DIR/THESIS_DATA_RAW_NIELSEN_DIR all resolve to the new 02_thesis_data tree; python3 -m py_compile clean on all 4 fixed scripts + PATHS.py + a preprocessing script spot-check (pre_csd_1_load_and_aggregate.py).
